allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/apidocs.json'\)\); print\('openapi:', d.get\('openapi'\)\); print\('title :', d['info']['title']\); print\('servers:', [s['url'] for s in d.get\('servers',[]\)]\); print\('tags  :', [t['name'] for t in d.get\('tags',[]\)]\); print\('paths :', len\(d.get\('paths',{}\)\),'endpoints'\); print\('schemas:', len\(d.get\('components',{}\).get\('schemas',{}\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('apidocs.json'\)\); print\('openapi:', d.get\('openapi'\)\); print\('title :', d['info']['title']\); print\('servers:', [s['url'] for s in d.get\('servers',[]\)]\); print\('tags  :', [t['name'] for t in d.get\('tags',[]\)]\); print\('paths :', len\(d.get\('paths',{}\)\),'endpoints'\); print\('schemas:', len\(d.get\('components',{}\).get\('schemas',{}\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', len\(d\)\); print\('sample:', {x['capability'] for x in d[:5]}\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d['name']\); print\('description:', d['description']\); print\('permissions:', [\(p['capability'], p['scope']\) for p in d['permissions']]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{r['name']}: {len\(r['permissions']\)} perms\\"\) for r in d]")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d claims_dev -c "SELECT id, author, exectype, to_char\(dateexecuted, 'HH24:MI:SS'\) AS t FROM databasechangelog ORDER BY orderexecuted;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d claims_dev -c "SELECT 'permission' AS t, count\(*\) FROM permission UNION ALL SELECT 'role', count\(*\) FROM role UNION ALL SELECT 'role_permission', count\(*\) FROM role_permission UNION ALL SELECT 'app_user', count\(*\) FROM app_user UNION ALL SELECT 'user_role_assignment', count\(*\) FROM user_role_assignment;")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['totalElements']\); [print\(f\\"  {u['email']:30} {u['userType']:14} {u['status']}\\"\) for u in d['content']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('roles:', d['activeRoles']\); [print\(f\\"  {p['capability']:40} {p['effectiveScope']}\\"\) for p in d['permissions']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('user:', d['email']\); [print\(f\\"  {a['roleName']:15} {a['status']:8} note={a['note']}\\"\) for a in d['roleAssignments']]")
Bash(node -e "const c = require\('ng2-charts'\); console.log\('ng2-charts exports:', Object.keys\(c\).sort\(\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('chart.js'\); console.log\('chart.js v:', c.Chart.version || 'unknown'\); console.log\('has registerables:', Array.isArray\(c.registerables\), '- length:', \(c.registerables||[]\).length\);")
